vocab.meaning: vị trí lái cao, bao quát
vocab.example: I gravitate towards full-sized SUVs primarily because they offer a commanding driving position that enhances my confidence on the road.

vocab.meaning: độ cứng cáp cấu trúc không thỏa hiệp
vocab.example: I have a profound appreciation for German engineering due to the uncompromising structural rigidity found in their luxury sedans.

vocab.meaning: thân xe với những đường nét chạm khắc tinh tế
vocab.example: Modern grand tourers often feature sculpted bodywork that captures the light beautifully at different angles.

vocab.meaning: sự sang trọng khiêm nhường (không phô trương)
vocab.example: I prefer cars that embody understated luxury, focusing on high-quality materials rather than flashy logos.

vocab.meaning: mức giá đắt đỏ đến mức khó tiếp cận
vocab.example: Hypercars are fascinating to observe, though their prohibitive price tag means they remain a distant dream for most.

vocab.meaning: các tính năng kết nối mượt mà
vocab.example: As a tech enthusiast, I am drawn to electric vehicles that offer seamless connectivity features with all my personal devices.

vocab.meaning: thể hiện khả năng ôm cua linh hoạt
vocab.example: I enjoy driving lightweight roadsters because they exhibit agile cornering that makes mountain roads a delight.

vocab.meaning: kết cấu khung gầm liền khối
vocab.example: Most contemporary crossovers utilize monocoque construction to provide a car-like ride quality despite their larger size.

vocab.meaning: trải nghiệm âm thanh đắm chìm
vocab.example: I am a fan of high-end vehicles that house premium sound systems, providing an immersive auditory experience during long commutes.
When choosing a car, I tend to favor Japanese brands known for their reliability and strong resale value.
